zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar於1445年9月出生在蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾時，他的父親William Gordon First of Lochinvar25歲，母親Princess Joan Gordon of Stitchill born Stewart, Princess of Scotland, Countess of Morton16歲。他於1472年與Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1517年5月11日在英國蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾享年71歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar于1445年9月出生在苏格兰吉德布萊次爾时，他的父亲William Gordon First of Lochinvar25岁，母亲Princess Joan Gordon of Stitchill born Stewart, Princess of Scotland, Countess of Morton16岁。他于1472年与Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1517年5月11日在英国苏格兰吉德布萊次爾享年71岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰度福利斯 安德 加洛韋。

nameMeanings.name: Gordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar was born in September 1445, in Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, his father, William Gordon First of Lochinvar, was 25 and his mother, Princess Joan Gordon of Stitchill born Stewart, Princess of Scotland, Countess of Morton, was 16. He married Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock in 1472, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 11 May 1517, in Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar est né en septembre 1445, à Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, son père, William Gordon First of Lochinvar, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Princess Joan Gordon of Stitchill born Stewart, Princess of Scotland, Countess of Morton, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock en 1472, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 11 mai 1517, à Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar im September 1445 in Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Gordon First of Lochinvar 25 und seine Mutter Princess Joan Gordon of Stitchill born Stewart, Princess of Scotland, Countess of Morton 16. Er hat 1472 in Schottland, United Kingdom Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 11. Mai 1517 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Kirkcudbrightshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar è nato il nel settembre 1445 nel Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William Gordon First of Lochinvar, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Princess Joan Gordon of Stitchill born Stewart, Princess of Scotland, Countess of Morton, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock nel 1472, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 maggio 1517, nel Kirkcudbrightshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Dumfries and Galloway, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvarが1445年9月にスコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Gordon First of Lochinvarは25歳，母Princess Joan Gordon of Stitchill born Stewart, Princess of Scotland, Countess of Mortonは16歳であった。1472年にイギリススコットランドでAnnabella Boyd of Kilmarnockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1517年5月11日にイギリススコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアで71歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドダムフリーズ アンド ガロワイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar(이)가 1445년 9월 스컷랜드 커크쿠드브라이츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Gordon First of Lochinvar(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Princess Joan Gordon of Stitchill born Stewart, Princess of Scotland, Countess of Morton(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1472년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1517년 5월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드 커크쿠드브라이츠히르에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar nasceu em setembro de 1445, em Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Gordon First of Lochinvar, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Princess Joan Gordon of Stitchill born Stewart, Princess of Scotland, Countess of Morton, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock em 1472, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar родился сентябрь 1445 г. в местности кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Gordon First of Lochinvar было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Joan Gordon of Stitchill born Stewart, Princess of Scotland, Countess of Morton, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock в 1472 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 11 мая 1517 г. в местности кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar nació en septiembre de 1445, en Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, su papá, William Gordon First of Lochinvar, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Princess Joan Gordon of Stitchill born Stewart, Princess of Scotland, Countess of Morton, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock en 1472, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de mayo de 1517, en Kirkcudbrightshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Dumfries and Galloway, Escocia, Reino Unido.
